title: dichromena exaltata
intro: Dichromena exaltata, also known as the fountain plant, is a perennial species of plant in the sedge family, native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dichromena exaltata include its potential to treat wounds, fever, and various infections, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
